nodes.label: Stylized husky head logo with blue eyes
nodes.description: A minimalist line-art illustration of a Siberian husky's face, front-facing, rendered in light gray/white outline strokes on a transparent background. The husky's eyes are highlighted in a vivid blue color, making them the focal point. Features include pointed ears, a defined snout, nose, and facial fur markings characteristic of the breed. Appears designed as a brand mark or logo.

nodes.label: Siberian Husky (dog breed)
nodes.description: A breed of working sled dog originating in Siberia, recognized by its thick fur, erect triangular ears, wolf-like facial markings, and characteristic blue or multi-colored eyes.

nodes.label: Logo / brand mark design
nodes.description: Minimal line-art logo style intended for use as a brand identifier, likely paired with a wordmark in a UI sidebar context.
